// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all default services.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Dependency1, global::TestNamespace.Dependency1>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Dependency2, global::TestNamespace.Dependency2>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Dependency3, global::TestNamespace.Dependency3>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
        {
            var s0_ctor0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency1>();
            var s0_p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency2>();
            var s0_m1 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency3>();
            var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.MyService(s0_ctor0) { Dep2 = s0_p0 };
            s0.Initialize(s0_m1);
            return s0;
        });
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyService>(sp => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.MyService>());

        return services;
    }
}
